description: Offers a day center, domestic and sexual violence advocacy, culturally specific LGBTQ2+ and Latinx services, relocation assistance, transportation to a safe location, accompaniment to medical or forensic exams, assistance applying for Crime Victims Compensation, and information and referral to community agencies. Provides educational programs. These programs focus on raising awareness about the dynamics of domestic and sexual violence, understanding trauma, and promoting prevention strategies within the community. Currently accepting volunteers.

name: THE HEALING CIRCLE INC VOCA CAMPS VOLUNTEER
provider_name: THE HEALING CIRCLE INC VOCA CAMPS VOLUNTEER
description: For community members interested in becoming volunteers at annual camps, an overnight or mentoring program for children who are survivors of sexual abuse.
address: 1054 Exchange Street Suite A Astoria, OR 97103

name: TORUS ENGLISH CLASSES
provider_name: TORUS ENGLISH CLASSES
description: Provides virtual and in person English as a second language (ESL) courses for limited English proficient (LEP) individuals. Offers volunteering opportunities to adults who are interested in teaching English.

name: U.ME.US VOLUNTEERING
provider_name: U.ME.US VOLUNTEERING
description: Provides individuals with the opportunity to volunteer at a food pantry.

name: UMPQUA DISCOVERY CENTER
provider_name: UMPQUA DISCOVERY CENTER
description: Educational and cultural center dedicated to preserving the Oregon Tidewater Community. Interactive exhibits and programs illustrate how land, water, and people have shaped each other and the area over time. Volunteer opportunities available.

name: VOLUNTEER SERVICES
provider_name: UNITED WAY OF LANE COUNTY COMMUNITY
description: Provides a volunteer hub for nonprofits to post volunteer positions. Recruits and refers volunteers to opportunities that match their interests and skills.

name: VETERANS BUNKER ST HELENS DAV VAN
provider_name: VETERANS BUNKER ST HELENS DAV VAN
description: Provides rides to medical appointments. Appointments to approved Veterans Affairs (VA) facilities only. Volunteer opportunities are available.

name: WASHINGTON COUNTY DISABILITY AGING AND VETERAN SERVICES VOLUNTEERS PROGRAM
provider_name: WASHINGTON COUNTY DISABILITY AGING AND VETERAN SERVICES VOLUNTEERS PROGRAM
description: Recruits volunteers and interns for positions to help the Washington County Disability, Aging, and Veteran Services Division (DAVS). DAVS volunteers and interns perform a variety of tasks for the division, including serving as Advisory Council members (board or committee work), providing in-person and/or one-on-one assistance to older adults, research assistants, client outreach callers, clerical assistants, case aids, and Medicare and health insurance counselors.
address: 5240 NE Elam Young Parkway Suite 300 Hillsboro, OR 97124

name: YMCA OF MARION AND POLK COUNTIES WOODBURN FAMILY YMCA WOODBURN FAMILY YMCA PROGRAMS
provider_name: YMCA OF MARION AND POLK COUNTIES WOODBURN FAMILY YMCA WOODBURN FAMILY YMCA PROGRAMS
description: Provides youth and adult sports in collaboration with Woodburn Recreation and Parks. Some of the activities provided are youth basketball, track and field, T-Ball, summer weekly clinics, and volleyball. Also offers an adult basketball league in the spring and fall. Volunteer opportunities are available.
